Welcome to Practica2’s documentation!¶

Modul usuari.py

class usuari.Usuari(nick, email, password)¶

Representa un usuari de iTICApp.

>>> u = Usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "abracadabra")
>>> u.nick
'AH39'
>>> print(u)
Usuari: AH39 Email: AH39@gmail.com Encripted password: cdtcecfcdtc
get_email()¶
>>> u = Usuari("LOLA", "LOLA@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> u.get_email()
'LOLA@gmail.com'
get_password()¶
>>> u = Usuari("LOLA", "LOLA@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> u.get_password()
'jqnc'
usuari.xifrat_cesar(text)¶

Encripta un text desplacant cada lletra 2 posicions.

>>> xifrat_cesar("abc")
'cde'
>>> xifrat_cesar("abracadabra")
'cdtcecfcdtc'

Modul post.py

class post.Hashtag(id)¶

Representa un hashtag de iTICApp.

>>> h1 = Hashtag("adventure")
>>> h1.id
'adventure'
>>> print(h1)
#adventure
>>> h1 == Hashtag("winter")
False
>>> h1 == Hashtag("adventure")
True
class post.Post(contingut)¶

Representa un post de iTICApp.

>>> p1 = Post("hola que tal")
>>> p1.contingut
'hola que tal'
>>> p1.id
1
get_date()¶
>>> p = Post("test")
>>> type(p.get_date())
<class 'str'>

Modul xarxaSocial.py

class xarxaSocial.iTICApp¶

Representa la xarxa social iTICApp.

>>> i = iTICApp()
>>> i.afegeix_usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> i.afegeix_hashtag("adventure")
>>> i.publicar_post("AH39", "zzz", "primer post")
afegeix_hashtag(id)¶
>>> i = iTICApp()
>>> i.afegeix_hashtag("XXXX")
>>> i.afegeix_hashtag("XXXX")
Error: ja existeix aquest hashtag
afegeix_usuari(nick, email, password)¶
>>> i = iTICApp()
>>> i.afegeix_usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> i.afegeix_usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "hola")
Error: ja existeix un usuari amb aquest nick
llistarPostsUser(nick)¶
>>> i = iTICApp()
>>> i.afegeix_usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> i.afegeix_hashtag("zzzzzz")
>>> i.publicar_post("AH39", "jajajaj", "primer post")
>>> i.llistarPostsUser("AH39")
['primer post']
publicar_post(nick, id_hashtag, contingut_post)¶
>>> i = iTICApp()
>>> i.afegeix_usuari("AH39", "AH39@gmail.com", "hola")
>>> i.afegeix_hashtag("YYYY")
>>> i.publicar_post("AH39", "adventure", "primer post")
>>> i.publicar_post("NOEXISTE", "adventure", "primer post")
Error: no existeix aquest usuari
